figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the definitions of apx, yq, cousinpx, yq and killerpx, yq. The block apx, yq is the closest ancestor of px, yq that lies on the longest chain C˚. The block cousinpxi, yiq is the unique block on C˚ with the same depth as pxi, yiq. Suppose J “ 1. Then killerpx1, y1q “ cousinpx1, y1q and pw, zq is the killer of px0, y0q, px2, y2q and px3, y3q.
